subcodes.first_line: O Ali! Verily God hath ordained for His loved ones stations in all ranks and conditions, and hath summoned them [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا على ان الله قدر لاحبائه مقامات فى جمیع المراتب و الشئون و دعاه
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @spiritual transformation, @effort; striving, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
